reviews.review_description:
I would like to request a refund on that new program cast and catch this year. I can’t even play the game. All I can do is set an a boat with a fishing rod inside I know to play and so far from the boulders iCan read it I don’t even know the kids could do it Even cast a bait play God real fishing oh, I end up with is sitting in a boat with a fishing line that I can’t cast thank you t-duke￼￼



I would like a refund Because it doesn’t work how do I get? It has a boat and a fishing rod I can’t throw a line out to fish and I sit there in the boat floating around. Please help me I’m 89 years old and I can’t read all the refund policy. This is the only way I know I might get a refund on This game I can’t even read Policies could you please let me know if I’m getting a refund thank ￼
My hands where tweeking and the line was swinging around
I bought this and can't get in my boat to fish looks fun. Can someone help me in this game please 🙏🏾 😫
